godot_policy.palette_affine_effects: preserve source-visible timing/effect with Godot-native materials/animation when implemented

unsupported.note: Map music ids and sound intent are preserved as symbols; real audio playback remains out of scope.
This batch map export covers source map JSON/layout grid data only; tileset animation playback remains a separate runtime/presentation task.
Layouts not referenced by any data/maps/*/map.json record are reported but not exported by the map batch entry point.
